policy.assignmentRule: Assign every explicitly supported tag and no unsupported tag.
policy.unknownRule: Unknown facts remain null or empty and must never be converted to false.
policy.identityRule: Identity and population tags require explicit applicant eligibility, preference, or direct support.
policy.applicationRule: Application requirement tags require current application evidence.
policy.negativeTagRule: Negative tags such as no-essay require explicit evidence.
policy.namedEntityRule: Retain exact institutions, employers, unions, tribes, organizations, diagnoses, and majors in typed fields.

tags.label: Financial Need
tags.definition: Financial need, low income, or economic hardship affects eligibility or selection.

tags.label: Academic Merit
tags.definition: Academic achievement, GPA, grades, rank, or scores affects selection.

tags.label: Talent Merit
tags.definition: Demonstrated artistic, athletic, technical, or other talent affects selection.

tags.label: Leadership
tags.definition: Leadership experience or potential affects eligibility or selection.

tags.label: Community Service
tags.definition: Volunteer or community service affects eligibility or selection.

tags.label: Extracurricular Involvement
tags.definition: School, campus, or extracurricular participation affects selection.

tags.label: Work Experience
tags.definition: Employment or professional experience is required or considered.

tags.label: Career Goals
tags.definition: Career plans or commitment to a profession affects selection.

tags.label: Overcoming Adversity
tags.definition: Overcoming significant hardship or barriers affects selection.

tags.label: Random Drawing
tags.definition: Recipient selection is a sweepstakes or random drawing.

tags.label: First-Generation Students
tags.definition: First-generation college students.

tags.label: Women and Girls
tags.definition: Women or girls are eligible or preferred.

tags.label: Men and Boys
tags.definition: Men or boys are explicitly eligible or preferred.

tags.label: Nonbinary and Gender-Diverse Students
tags.definition: Nonbinary, transgender, or gender-diverse students.

tags.label: Black Students
tags.definition: Black or African American students.

tags.label: Hispanic or Latino Students
tags.definition: Hispanic or Latino students.

tags.label: Indigenous Students
tags.definition: Indigenous, Native American, Alaska Native, Native Hawaiian, First Nations, or tribal students.

tags.label: Asian Students
tags.definition: Asian or Asian American students.

tags.label: Pacific Islander Students
tags.definition: Native Hawaiian or Pacific Islander students.

tags.label: Middle Eastern or North African Students
tags.definition: Middle Eastern or North African students.

tags.label: Multiracial Students
tags.definition: Multiracial students are explicitly eligible or supported.

tags.label: Underrepresented Students
tags.definition: Broadly underrepresented or historically excluded students where no narrower group is stated.

tags.label: LGBTQ+ Students
tags.definition: LGBTQ+ students.

tags.label: International Students
tags.definition: International or non-US students are explicitly eligible.

tags.label: Immigrant Students
tags.definition: Immigrants or children of immigrants.

tags.label: Refugee or Asylee Students
tags.definition: Refugees, asylum seekers, or asylees.

tags.label: DACA or Undocumented Students
tags.definition: DACA recipients or undocumented students.

tags.label: Rural Students
tags.definition: Students from rural areas or communities.

tags.label: Urban Students
tags.definition: Students from explicitly defined urban communities.

tags.label: Adult and Returning Learners
tags.definition: Adult, returning, nontraditional, or career-changing learners.

tags.label: Students with Disabilities
tags.definition: Physical, sensory, intellectual, developmental, or learning disability.

tags.label: Chronic Illness or Medical Condition
tags.definition: Student has a chronic illness, syndrome, or serious medical condition.

tags.label: Cancer-Affected Students
tags.definition: Patient, survivor, or immediate family member affected by cancer.

tags.label: Student Caregivers
tags.definition: Student is an unpaid or family caregiver.

tags.label: Foster Care Experience
tags.definition: Current or former foster youth.

tags.label: Adopted Students
tags.definition: Adopted students are explicitly eligible.

tags.label: Homeless or Housing-Insecure Students
tags.definition: Homelessness or housing insecurity.

tags.label: Food-Insecure Students
tags.definition: Food insecurity is explicitly required or considered.

tags.label: Single Parents
tags.definition: Student is a single parent.

tags.label: Student Parents
tags.definition: Student has dependent children.

tags.label: Bereaved Students
tags.definition: Death of a parent, guardian, sibling, spouse, or child.

tags.label: Orphaned Students
tags.definition: Both parents or legal guardians are deceased or absent under an explicit rule.

tags.label: Domestic Violence Survivors
tags.definition: Survivor of domestic or intimate-partner violence.

tags.label: Justice-Impacted Students
tags.definition: Student or immediate family is affected by incarceration or the justice system.

tags.label: Displaced or Disaster-Affected Students
tags.definition: Displacement or hardship caused by disaster, conflict, or emergency.

tags.label: Veterans
tags.definition: Veteran applicant.

tags.label: Active-Duty Military
tags.definition: Active-duty, Guard, or Reserve applicant.

tags.label: Military Families
tags.definition: Military or veteran spouse, child, or dependent.

tags.label: Gold Star Families
tags.definition: Family of a service member who died in service.

tags.label: First Responders
tags.definition: Applicant is a first responder.

tags.label: First Responder Families
tags.definition: Child, spouse, or dependent of a first responder.

tags.label: Public Safety Families
tags.definition: Family of police, fire, EMS, corrections, or similar personnel.

tags.label: Organization Membership
tags.definition: Membership in a named association, club, professional body, or nonprofit is required.

tags.label: Union Affiliation
tags.definition: Applicant or family has required labor-union membership.

tags.label: Employee Eligibility
tags.definition: Applicant is an employee of a named employer.

tags.label: Employee Families
tags.definition: Child, spouse, or dependent of an employee.

tags.label: Alumni Families
tags.definition: Child or descendant of alumni.

tags.label: Profession Families
tags.definition: Parent, guardian, or spouse works in a named occupation or industry.

tags.label: Religious Affiliation
tags.definition: Faith, denomination, congregation, ministry, or religious membership is required or preferred.

tags.label: Tribal Membership
tags.definition: Enrollment or citizenship in a named tribe or nation is required.

tags.label: Fraternity or Sorority Affiliation
tags.definition: Greek-letter organization membership or family affiliation.

tags.label: Agricultural Organization
tags.definition: Membership in FFA, 4-H, farm bureau, or a related agricultural organization.

tags.label: Student Athletes
tags.definition: Participation in one or more sports affects eligibility.

tags.label: Esports Participants
tags.definition: Esports participation is explicitly required or considered.

tags.label: Arts Participants
tags.definition: Participation or demonstrated talent in creative or performing arts.

tags.label: Student Government
tags.definition: Student-government participation or leadership.

tags.label: ROTC or JROTC
tags.definition: ROTC or JROTC participation.

tags.label: Scouting
tags.definition: Scouting participation or rank.

tags.label: FFA or 4-H
tags.definition: FFA or 4-H participation.

tags.label: Volunteer Participation
tags.definition: Volunteer participation is required.

tags.label: Arts and Design
tags.definition: Visual arts, design, or broad creative study.

tags.label: Performing Arts
tags.definition: Theatre, dance, performance, or related study.

tags.label: Music
tags.definition: Music study, composition, performance, or education.

tags.label: Writing and Literature
tags.definition: Writing, literature, or language arts.

tags.label: Film and Media Production
tags.definition: Film, photography, broadcast production, or related media creation.

tags.label: STEM
tags.definition: Science, technology, engineering, or mathematics.

tags.label: Engineering
tags.definition: Engineering study or careers.

tags.label: Computer Science and IT
tags.definition: Computer science, software, information systems, or IT.

tags.label: Cybersecurity
tags.definition: Cybersecurity, information assurance, or information security.

tags.label: Data Science and AI
tags.definition: Data science, machine learning, or artificial intelligence.

tags.label: Mathematics and Statistics
tags.definition: Mathematics, statistics, actuarial science, or quantitative study.

tags.label: Physical Sciences
tags.definition: Chemistry, physics, astronomy, earth science, or related physical science.

tags.label: Life Sciences
tags.definition: Biology, biochemistry, ecology, or related life science.

tags.label: Healthcare and Health Sciences
tags.definition: Healthcare, clinical care, or health science.

tags.label: Nursing
tags.definition: Nursing study or careers.

tags.label: Medicine
tags.definition: Medical school, medicine, physicians, or pre-medicine.

tags.label: Dentistry
tags.definition: Dentistry, oral health, dental hygiene, or assisting.

tags.label: Optometry
tags.definition: Optometry, vision science, or optometric practice. Do not classify optometry as medicine.

tags.label: Pharmacy
tags.definition: Pharmacy or pharmaceutical study.

tags.label: Public Health
tags.definition: Public health, epidemiology, community health, or health policy.

tags.label: Allied Health
tags.definition: Allied health and clinical support professions.

tags.label: Mental and Behavioral Health
tags.definition: Mental health, counseling, therapy, or behavioral health.

tags.label: Veterinary and Animal Health
tags.definition: Veterinary medicine, veterinary technology, or animal health.

tags.label: Education and Teaching
tags.definition: Education, teaching, school counseling, or educator careers.

tags.label: Early Childhood Education
tags.definition: Early childhood education or care.

tags.label: Special Education
tags.definition: Special education teaching or services.

tags.label: Business
tags.definition: Business administration, management, or broad business study.

tags.label: Accounting and Finance
tags.definition: Accounting, finance, banking, economics, or financial planning.

tags.label: Entrepreneurship
tags.definition: Entrepreneurship, venture creation, or small business.

tags.label: Marketing and Sales
tags.definition: Marketing, advertising, or sales.

tags.label: Hospitality and Tourism
tags.definition: Hospitality, tourism, or hotel management.

tags.label: Law and Legal Studies
tags.definition: Law school, pre-law, legal studies, or paralegal study.

tags.label: Criminal Justice and Public Safety
tags.definition: Criminal justice, law enforcement, emergency services, or public safety.

tags.label: Public Service and Government
tags.definition: Government, public administration, public policy, nonprofit, or civic service.

tags.label: Social Work and Human Services
tags.definition: Social work, human services, or related helping professions.

tags.label: Psychology and Behavioral Science
tags.definition: Psychology or behavioral science.

tags.label: Communications and Journalism
tags.definition: Communications, journalism, public relations, or media studies.

tags.label: Skilled Trades
tags.definition: Skilled trade, vocational, technical, or industrial education.

tags.label: Architecture and Construction
tags.definition: Architecture, construction management, building science, or construction trades.

tags.label: Manufacturing
tags.definition: Manufacturing, machining, fabrication, or industrial production.

tags.label: Automotive and Transportation
tags.definition: Automotive, diesel, transportation, logistics, or vehicle technology.

tags.label: Cosmetology and Personal Care
tags.definition: Cosmetology, barbering, esthetics, or personal care.

tags.label: Culinary Arts
tags.definition: Culinary arts, baking, food service, or culinary management.

tags.label: Agriculture and Food Systems
tags.definition: Agriculture, agribusiness, food systems, horticulture, or forestry.

tags.label: Environment and Conservation
tags.definition: Environmental science, sustainability, conservation, wildlife, or fisheries.

tags.label: Aviation and Aerospace
tags.definition: Aviation, aerospace, pilots, or air traffic careers.

tags.label: Institution-Specific
tags.definition: Eligibility is limited to a named institution or system.

tags.label: Community College
tags.definition: Specifically supports community-college students or attendance.

tags.label: Trade or Vocational Education
tags.definition: Supports vocational, technical, certificate, or trade education.

tags.label: Transfer Students
tags.definition: Transfer status is required or preferred.

tags.label: Study Abroad
tags.definition: Funds or requires study abroad or international academic travel.

tags.label: Online Programs Eligible
tags.definition: Online enrollment is explicitly eligible.

tags.label: Part-Time Eligible
tags.definition: Part-time enrollment is explicitly eligible.

tags.label: Enrollment Not Required
tags.definition: Applicants need not currently be enrolled.

tags.label: GED Eligible
tags.definition: GED recipients are explicitly eligible.

tags.label: Career Training
tags.definition: Nondegree workforce, licensing, credential, or short-term training is eligible.

tags.label: Graduate Research
tags.definition: Primarily supports graduate research rather than general tuition.

tags.label: Professional Development
tags.definition: Funds continuing education or professional development.

tags.label: Scholarship
tags.definition: Standard educational scholarship.

tags.label: Grant
tags.definition: Grant funding rather than a competitive scholarship.

tags.label: Fellowship
tags.definition: Fellowship program, usually graduate, research, or professional.

tags.label: Contest or Competition
tags.definition: Award determined through a contest or competition.

tags.label: Tuition Waiver
tags.definition: Full or partial tuition waiver.

tags.label: Forgivable Loan
tags.definition: Loan may be forgiven after satisfying service or employment conditions.

tags.label: Stipend
tags.definition: Living, research, travel, or participation stipend.

tags.label: Internship-Linked
tags.definition: Award includes or requires an internship.

tags.label: Service Commitment
tags.definition: Recipient must complete employment, service, teaching, or residency obligations.

tags.label: Renewable
tags.definition: Award may be renewed for additional terms or years.

tags.label: One-Time Award
tags.definition: Award is explicitly nonrenewable.

tags.label: Last-Dollar Award
tags.definition: Award fills remaining cost after other aid.

tags.label: Full Tuition
tags.definition: Award explicitly covers full tuition.

tags.label: Full Ride
tags.definition: Award covers tuition plus major living or attendance costs.

tags.label: Travel Funding
tags.definition: Primary purpose is academic or professional travel.

tags.label: Research Funding
tags.definition: Primary purpose is research expenses or participation.

tags.label: Essay Required
tags.definition: One or more essays or personal statements are required.

tags.label: No Essay
tags.definition: Current application explicitly requires no essay.

tags.label: Recommendation Required
tags.definition: One or more recommendation letters are required.

tags.label: Transcript Required
tags.definition: Academic transcript is required.

tags.label: FAFSA Required
tags.definition: FAFSA submission is required.

tags.label: Financial Documents Required
tags.definition: Income, tax, SAR, or other need documentation is required.

tags.label: Portfolio Required
tags.definition: Creative or professional portfolio is required.

tags.label: Audition Required
tags.definition: Audition is required.

tags.label: Interview Required
tags.definition: Interview is required.

tags.label: Video Required
tags.definition: Video submission is required.

tags.label: Work Sample Required
tags.definition: Writing, research, code, project, or another work sample is required.

tags.label: Test Scores Required
tags.definition: Standardized test scores are required.

tags.label: Resume Required
tags.definition: Resume or activity list is required.

tags.label: Nomination Required
tags.definition: Applicant must be nominated or endorsed.

tags.label: Enrollment Verification Required
tags.definition: Proof of enrollment or acceptance is required.

tags.label: Citizenship Documentation Required
tags.definition: Proof of citizenship or immigration status is required.

tags.label: Application Fee
tags.definition: An application fee is explicitly required.

tags.label: No Application Fee
tags.definition: Application explicitly has no fee.
